name: Fresh Jalapeno Corn Muffins (Mandel)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup corn kernels, cut from two ears
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, oil, and egg in a mixing bowl and stir until well mixed.
2. Stir in buttermilk.
3. Add corn, jalapeno, shallot, flour, cornmeal, baking soda, and salt; stir until well mixed.
4. Let batter rest for 15 minutes.
5. Pour batter into 12 paper-lined or greased muffin cups (about 7/8 full).
6. Bake at 375°F until lightly browned and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 20 minutes.
7. Allow muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring them to a rack to cool to room temperature.
Notes:
- Muffins can be made several hours ahead or frozen up to 1 month.
- To serve, reheat on a baking sheet at 300°F for 10 minutes.
- Serving size: 12 muffins. Each muffin contains approximately 205 calories, 177 mg sodium, 18 mg cholesterol, 10 grams fat, 26 grams carbohydrates, and 3 grams protein.
